description: A minimal Graffiticode display dialect with two primitives: `hello` for rendering a greeting string and `image` for rendering an image from a URL. Emits one rendered element per program. Exists primarily as the simplest working example of the Graffiticode pipeline; for richer UI use L0012 (adds a theme) or L0002 (adds the full base language).

example_prompts.notes: Exercises the `hello` primitive with a non-canonical string so the translator doesn't hardcode 'world'.
Exercises the `image` primitive with a different URL and verb so the translator doesn't overfit to one phrasing.
